title: Fable 5 Returns... This Is Big
summary: The video claims that Fable 5, a Claude model previously withdrawn over national security concerns, may be returning based on leaked code strings, AWS Bedrock listing, and Congressional pressure. It argues that Anthropic is advancing faster and may release the model with government scrutiny and a stronger Mythos successor waiting.
writeup: The video reports that Fable 5, a Claude model Anthropic previously withdrew over national security concerns, may be returning, citing leaked code strings, an AWS Bedrock listing, and Congressional pressure as evidence. It argues Anthropic is moving faster and could release the model under government scrutiny, with a stronger successor named Mythos waiting behind it. The framing ties the claims to access control, export controls, and frontier AI oversight.
